name: Comp denied, talked to adjuster already in North Salt Lake, options?
description: Request ULC hearing; stop talking to adjuster.[3]

mainEntity.name: Comp denied, talked to adjuster already in North Salt Lake, options?

acceptedAnswer.text: Request ULC hearing; stop talking to adjuster.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: File Labor Commission hearing despite adjuster talks; their notes can be used against you.[3] Don't negotiate alone post-denial.[2] Key factors: (1) Gather all evidence; (2) Avoid new statements; (3) Prepare for cross-exam; (4) Third-party? Pursue.[3][4] Organize file, cease adjuster contact. Appeal reverses many denials.
